subtitle: You can complete the basic onboarding first. Platform and chat provider setup can both be skipped.

onboard.title: Quick Onboarding
onboard.subtitle: Complete initialization directly on the welcome page.
onboard.step2Desc: Connect AstrBot to IM platforms like QQ, Lark, Slack, Telegram, etc.
onboard.step3Title: Allow Agent to Use the Computer
onboard.step3Desc: Set whether the Agent can access and use this computer.
onboard.step3HelpItem1: The Agent can access and use the workspace directory, which is isolated for each user, as well as Skills to handle more complex tasks.
onboard.step3HelpItem2: For AstrBot administrators, the Agent is additionally allowed to execute shell commands, run Python code, and access all local directories on this machine.
onboard.providerUpdateFailed: Failed to update default chat provider in config file "default"
onboard.providerDefaultUpdated: Default chat provider in config file "default" has been set to {id}
onboard.computerAccessUpdateFailed: Failed to update Agent computer access
onboard.computerAccessAllowed: Agent is now allowed to access and use the computer
onboard.computerAccessDenied: Agent is no longer allowed to access and use the computer
onboard.step3HelpItem3: For more detailed control, configure the Computer Access options under Settings -> General -> Computer Access.

resources.title: Resources
resources.afdianDesc: Support the AstrBot team on Afdian.
